name: Weekly CS Digest Generator
description: Compiles a weekly digest of account activity, risk alerts, wins, and action items for CS leadership.
longDescription: Runs every Monday morning and aggregates the past week's customer success activity into a formatted digest. Includes new risk flags raised, issues resolved, expansion wins, upcoming renewals, and key action items. Sends the digest via Slack and email to CS leadership, providing a comprehensive snapshot of portfolio health without manual report-building.
